activities.locationEn: La Baie Park South Parking Lot
activities.titleZh: 夏末中国烟花桨板之夜
activities.summaryZh: 夏末夜晚的桨板活动，风景优美，适合轻松娱乐。
activities.summaryEn: An evening paddle with beautiful views, perfect for a relaxed outing.

activities.titleZh: 仲夏夜夜走 | 赏渥太华夜景。
activities.summaryZh: 夜走又回来啦，这次我们去西部小屋，夜走+火锅或者泡面，轻松路线，适合新手。
activities.summaryEn: A classic ridge route with reliable views and steady climbing.

activities.locationZh: 渥太华河 Shirleys Bay--Aylmer Island 段
activities.titleZh: 渥太华河日落沙滩桨板局
activities.summaryZh: 5:30pm集合，稳定水域轻松路线，电动桨板支持适合新手。
activities.summaryEn: A calm-water route suitable for first-time paddlers.
